files.app_contracts_shim: app/contracts/__init__.py 自动转发 (dir(_real) 遍历) — 无需改动，CaseFolder/sanitize_case_folder 经 shim 身份保持可达

sanitize_case_folder: fail-closed 拒四类键: ①裁判正文型(chunk_text/judgment_text/summary_text/highlight_text/matched_text/full_text/content/...) ②起草正文型(draft_body/generated_text/opinion_text/paragraph_body/conclusion_text/...) ③PII型(name/id_card/phone/address/...) ④胜负/结论型(win_probability/outcome_prediction/verdict/case_summary_text/...)
异常只回键名/reason code，绝不回显原始值
search_profile_summary 走 E4 sanitize_intake_search_profile 同口径: 正文/PII fail-closed + 只保留 SearchProfile 脱敏白名单子集键，其余丢弃
candidate_refs 逐项收敛(CaseFolderCandidateRef = CandidateRef 白名单七字段)，缺锚点项 fail-closed 丢弃，保留项 100% 有 source_anchors
draft_descriptors 逐项走 E6 sanitize_draft_descriptor，缺骨架丢弃、禁止键抛错，内层引用缺锚点亦丢弃
visibility 缺省(含空串)补 private；非空非法值(public/world/...) fail-closed 拒绝
输出只含 CASE_FOLDER_E7_FIELDS 白名单字段、零裁判正文、零起草正文、零原始案情
sanitize_rules.assert_no_case_body: 断言无裁判正文/起草正文/原始案情(PII)/胜负结论型键，递归校验 candidate_refs/draft_descriptors(及其内层 candidate_refs/statute_refs) + search_profile_summary

enable_casebook_boundary.note: 本步只写边界语义(默认私有 + on路径降级口径)，端点/多租户落库在 E7-2
